topics.title: Jonathan Levine in Talks to Direct 'Days of Thunder' Legacyquel
topics.angle: Jonathan Levine is in talks to direct the 'Days of Thunder' legacyquel with Tom Cruise.

sources.headline: Days of Thunder 2 : Jonathan Levine in Talks to Direct Tom Cruise in Paramount Sequel
sources.summary: Paramount s Days of Thunder sequel is shaping up with Jonathan Levine ( 50/50, Warm Bodies ) in negotiations to direct returning star Tom Cruise. Cruise will also produce the film alongside Jerry Bruckheimer, who produced the original 1990 racing drama. Will Staples wrote the script for the sequel. sources.headline: Benicio Del Toro To Star In Apple Comedy Series ‘Protective Custody’
sources.summary: Benicio Del Toro is getting into the comedy game and is reuniting with his Escape at Dannemora colleague Ben Stiller as he does so. sources.headline: Benicio Del Toro Joins Ben Stiller in Apple TV Comedy Protective Custody
sources.summary: Benicio Del Toro is set for a lead role opposite Ben Stiller in the upcoming Apple TV comedy series Protective Custody, Variety has learned. The show was originally announced in May with Stiller attached to star and executive produce. It marks the first lead series comedy role of Del Toro s career as well as a [ ]

sources.headline: Julie Andrews Gets Disney+ Documentary From ‘Martha’ Director R.J. Cutler
